subject: feat(icons): replace browser-based icon generator with Sharp
body:
Single SVG source (assets/icon-source.svg) generates all PNGs via Sharp
at 400 DPI for crisp anti-aliased edges even at small sizes (48px favicon).

Changes:
- Add assets/icon-source.svg: 1024x1024 canvas with shape-rendering=
  geometricPrecision (scaled up from old 512x512 public/icon.svg)
- Add scripts/generate-icons.mjs: Sharp-based generator producing
  7 PNGs + SVG copy to public/. Run via `npm run gen:icons`
- Add sharp as devDependency
- Regenerate all icon PNGs at 400 DPI (crisper than old versions)
- manifest.json: Separate purpose values (any vs maskable) per PWA spec
- app.json: Splash uses splash-icon.png, backgrounds match SVG (#0A0A0A)
- Delete scripts/generate-icons.html (browser-based, replaced)
- CLAUDE.md: Update Icon Assets and Regenerating Icons sections

Tags: icons, pwa, build-tools, sharp
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 1
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor
